data.name: Absci Corporation
data.description: Absci Corporation, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, develops various antibody therapeutics in the United States. Its preclinical development programs include ABS-101, which is in Phase 1 clinical trial for the treatment of inflammatory bowel disease; ABS-201, an anti-prolactin receptor (PRLR) antibody, which is phase 1/2a clinical trial for treating androgenic alopecia; ABS-301 for the ...
